betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Irradiator: QMD Fission Irradiator Multiblock§f

§aThe QMD Irradiator is a chamber-based version of the Fission Irradiator.§f
The §bIrradiator§f (`qmd:irradiator`, also called the §bQMD Fission Irradiator§f) is QMD's §b§f§cchamber-form§f§f of the Fission Irradiator concept. It is a §b§f§cmultiblock machine§f§f that uses an adjacent §b§f§cFission Reactor§f§f's neutron flux to §b§f§ctransmute items§f§f into other items, and is a §b§f§ckey component of the QMD silicon doping chain§f§f.

§6Crafting Recipe (graph: minecraft.crafting)§f:
Per the JEI graph, the Irradiator recipe requires:
- §bTungsten Ingot§f (`hbm:ingot_tungsten`) — used as a §b§f§cneutron reflector shield§f§f
- §bDU Plating§f (`nuclearcraft:part:2`) — §b§f§cDepleted Uranium Plating§f§f for radiation shielding
- §bMachine Chassis§f (`nuclearcraft:part:10`)

§6Function§f:
The Irradiator is the §b§f§cQMD version§f§f of the §bNC Fission Irradiator§f. It exposes target items to a §b§f§cneutron flux§f§f produced by an adjacent running Fission Reactor, triggering §b§f§cneutron activation transmutations§f§f:
- §bSilicon Wafer§f → §bN-Type Doped Silicon§f (`qmd:semiconductor:1`) — per `QMDRecipes.java:512` (`fission_irradiator.addRecipe("waferSilicon", "siliconNDoped", 120000, 0d, 0)`)
- §bUranium-234 Ingot§f → §bUranium-235 Ingot§f — isotope enrichment via neutron capture
- §bProtactinium-231 Dust§f → §bProtactinium-233 Dust§f — same principle
- §bCobalt Ingot§f → §bCobalt-60 Ingot§f — radioisotope production

§6How to Use It§f:
1. Build a §b§f§crunning Fission Reactor§f§f (NC or QMD variant).
2. Place the §bIrradiator§f adjacent to the reactor's neutron output face.
3. Supply §btarget items§f to the Irradiator's input slot.
4. The reactor's neutron flux transmutes the items over time (per recipe RF cost).

§6Component Supply Chain§f:
- §bTungsten Ingot§f → from §bTungsten Ore§f processing in §b§f§cCentrifuge§f§f or §b§f§cElectrolyzer§f§f
- §bDU Plating§f → from §bNC Manufactory§f using §bDepleted Uranium Ingot§f
- §bMachine Chassis§f → from §bNC Manufactory§f

§6Direct Descendants (graph-confirmed)§f:
None — the Irradiator is a §b§f§cstandalone machine§f§f. Its outputs feed into §bBasic Processor§f production (via N-Type Doped Silicon) and §bIsotope Production§f chains.

§eTip§f: The Irradiator is a §b§f§cchamber-style multiblock§f§f — you must have a running Fission Reactor adjacent to it. If you don't have a §bSolid Fission Reactor§f set up yet, you can also use the §bNC Fission Irradiator§f (single-block variant) which doesn't require adjacency — see the §bFission Irradiator§f quest for details.
